archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Adapted for MNC E-commerce)

body.notes: Mukta provides excellent readability for dense data and strong Devanagari/Hindi support.

mobile_first_rules: Use bottom navigation bar on mobile (Home, Categories, Cart, Account).
Sticky top header with search bar visible at all times on mobile.
Product Detail Page (PDP) must have a sticky 'Add to Cart' / 'Buy Now' bottom bar on mobile.
Use horizontal scrolling rails for categories, brands, and deals-of-the-day on mobile.
Product grids on mobile should be 2-column (grid-cols-2) with minimal gap (gap-2) to maximize image size.
spacing_and_layout.card_style: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg overflow-hidden shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

buttons.primary: bg-[#2B5CC6] text-white hover:bg-[#224A9F] active:bg-[#1C3E85] font-semibold rounded-md transition-colors
buttons.accent: bg-[#F5821F] text-white hover:bg-[#E07015] active:bg-[#C96210] font-semibold rounded-md transition-colors (Use for 'Buy Now' or 'Deals')
buttons.outline: border border-slate-300 bg-transparent text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 rounded-md transition-colors

inputs.style: bg-white border border-slate-300 rounded-md focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2B5CC6] focus:border-transparent text-slate-900

badges.deal: bg-[#F5821F] text-white text-xs font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded-sm uppercase tracking-wider
badges.discount: text-[#16A34A] font-bold text-sm bg-green-50 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm
badges.assured: bg-[#2B5CC6] text-white text-xs font-semibold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full inline-flex items-center gap-1

product_card.layout: Vertical stack. Image container (aspect-square, bg-slate-50, p-2), Title (line-clamp-2, text-sm), Rating (stars + count), Price block (Current price, MRP strikethrough, % off), Delivery status, Quick Add button.
product_card.interactions: Hover reveals quick add on desktop. Entire card is clickable.

pdp_layout.mobile: Full-width image carousel, Title/Price/Badges, Delivery pincode check, Highlights chips, Specs Accordion, Description, Sticky bottom Add to Cart bar.
pdp_layout.desktop: Left sticky image gallery. Right scrollable details. Right-most sticky buy box (Amazon style).

login_page.style: Guest-first checkout pattern or OTP-first login. Clean centered card layout on desktop, full-screen clean flow on mobile. Use an aspirational office/tech hero image on the left half for desktop.
login_page.admin_login: Separate secure portal look. Darker theme (bg-slate-900 text-white) to distinctly separate from consumer storefront. Sharp, high-contrast.

image_urls.description: High-end office printer, representing main category
Circuit board, representing printer logic boards and computer parts
Laptop repair, representing service tools and spare parts

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure complete mobile responsiveness. The bottom tab navigation is critical for the consumer site on mobile screens (< 768px).
In product cards, do not center text. Left-align title, price, and ratings for better scannability.
For the header, implement a robust search bar that includes a dropdown for 'Search by Printer Model', 'Search by Part Number', etc.
Implement language toggle (EN/HI) cleanly in the top utility bar.
The login screen for customers should be a clean, high-conversion OTP/Email flow. The admin login should have a distinctly different, darker 'secure portal' aesthetic.
Use standard Shadcn components but strip away heavy radiuses. Use rounded-md (6px) or rounded-lg (8px) for a more authoritative MNC e-commerce look.
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes for testing.
